name: Tangled Bundle
descs: When the ally with the fastest Speed deals damage to an enemy with a Skill that inflicts [Laceration] Potency, Count, or 'Unique Bleed', deal +12.5% damage.
When 2 allies with the fastest Speed deals damage to an enemy with a Skill that inflicts [Laceration] Potency, Count, or 'Unique Bleed', deal +15% damage.
When 3 allies with the fastest Speed deals damage to an enemy with a Skill that inflicts [Laceration] Potency, Count, or 'Unique Bleed', deal +20% damage.
